subcodes.first_line: The Book of God hath verily been sent down in truth, and the Tablet of God hath appeared from the Mother Book, and it proclaimeth: There is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله قد نزل بالحق و لوح الله قد ظهر من ام الکتاب و انه ینطق انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering; rejection of Christ
